'''''Backstab'' 30''' is the thirtieth issue of the French [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] magazine [[Backstab (magazine)|''Backstab'']]. It was released in [[May]] [[2001]].

==Contents==
*"[[La Révolte d'Acier: Épisode 3 - À la recherche du Temple Maudit]]"
